$comment_block.file_purpose: Define Vercel routing and mandatory security headers for all responses.
key_security_considerations: Applies baseline browser hardening headers at the platform edge.
Complements framework-level middleware for defense in depth.
Astro dashboard deployed as root; API backend separate.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://supabase.co
